chapter_title.ar: بَابُ زِيَارَةِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/257)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/257)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَنْ أَتَانِي زَائِراً كُنْتُ شَفِيعَهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Aban, from Al Sadousy,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The one who comes to mesaww for Ziyarah, Isaww shall intercede for him on the Day of Judgement’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from ibn Mahbub from Aban from al-Sadusiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Whoever comes to visit me, I will intercede on his behalf on the Day of Judgment.’”
